# Security Policy

## Supported Versions

| Version | Supported |
| ------- | --------- |
| 0.x     | Yes       |

## Reporting a Vulnerability

**Please do not open a public GitHub issue for security vulnerabilities.**

Report vulnerabilities privately by emailing **[security@nrth.com](mailto:security@nrth.com)** or using
[GitHub's private vulnerability reporting](https://github.com/agile-north/dockship/security/advisories/new).

Include:

- A description of the vulnerability
- Steps to reproduce or a proof-of-concept
- The version(s) affected
- Any suggested mitigations

We aim to acknowledge reports within **2 business days** and to issue a fix or
mitigation within **14 days** for confirmed critical issues.
